name: Mitochondrial dysfunction (post-viral)
description: OXPHOS deficit + PEM in Long COVID / ME-CFS subset
diagnostic_markers: Lactate elevation; mtDNA copy number; acylcarnitine panel; muscle biopsy in severe cases

name: Autonomic dysfunction (POTS / dysautonomia)
diagnostic_markers: Tilt-table test; HUTT; HRV reduction; orthostatic tachycardia ≥30bpm
notes: New dimension not in autism atlas

name: Mast cell activation (LC-MCAS)
diagnostic_markers: Tryptase; methylhistamine; chromogranin A; histamine intolerance symptoms

name: Neuroinflammation / brain fog
diagnostic_markers: IL-6; TNF-alpha; neopterin; BBB disruption proxies

name: Microbiome dysbiosis (post-viral)
diagnostic_markers: 16S panel; Akkermansia depletion; Faecalibacterium depletion; dysbiosis index

name: Microvascular / coagulopathy (fibrinaloid microclots)
description: Anomalous fibrin polymerization resistant to plasmin
diagnostic_markers: Microclot detection (thioflavin T fluorescence); d-dimer; vWF

name: Post-viral autoimmune
diagnostic_markers: GPCR autoantibodies (b-adrenergic muscarinic); ANA conversion; new-onset Hashimoto/RA

name: Persistent SARS-CoV-2 reservoir
diagnostic_markers: Spike in plasma (Swank); viral RNA in gut biopsy; persistent S1 in monocytes

name: HPA-axis / hormonal dysregulation
diagnostic_markers: AM cortisol low; DHEA-S low; reverse-T3 elevated
